instruction: Add a bounded whole-system constraint so channels are ratios inside one shared signal shell, not isolated window products.

global_shell.definition: shared bounded normalized relation of W1/W2/W3
global_shell.purpose: keeps all three domains inside one whole signal state

ch7.presence: all three windows exist inside the global shell

code_changes.name: normalize_to_global_shell
code_changes.code:
def normalize_to_global_shell(w_delta, eps=1e-12):
    W = np.abs(np.array(w_delta, dtype=np.float64))
    total = float(np.sum(W) + eps)
    shell = W / total
    shell_magnitude = float(np.linalg.norm(W))
    return shell, shell_magnitude

code_changes.name: compute_channel_ratios
code_changes.code:
def compute_channel_ratios(w_delta, eps=1e-12):
    shell, shell_magnitude = normalize_to_global_shell(w_delta, eps=eps)
    W1, W2, W3 = shell

    raw = np.array([
        W1,
        W2,
        W3,
        min(W1, W2),
        min(W1, W3),
        min(W2, W3),
        min(W1, W2, W3)
    ], dtype=np.float64)

    whole = float(np.sum(raw) + eps)
    ratios = raw / whole

    ch7_presence = 1.0 if np.all(shell > eps) else 0.0
    ch7_intensity = float(np.min(shell) / (np.max(shell) + eps))

    return {
        'whole': whole,
        'shell_magnitude': shell_magnitude,
        'global_shell': shell.tolist(),
        'raw_channels': raw.tolist(),
        'channel_ratios': ratios.tolist(),
        'ch7_presence': ch7_presence,
        'ch7_intensity': ch7_intensity
    }

details: After computing normalized W1/W2/W3 deltas, call compute_channel_ratios(ticks).
Store global_shell, shell_magnitude, ch7_presence, and ch7_intensity in each result.
Keep channels as ratios, not symbolic dynamic states.

global_shell.dominated: one window controls most of the whole
global_shell.drifting: effective DOF structure is changing over time

ch7_intensity.near_0: one or more domains weak relative to whole

ch7_presence.0: one or more windows are below threshold

success_conditions: channels remain ratios to the bounded whole
ch7 is no longer treated as disappearing structure
ch7 intensity shows coupling strength instead of raw product collapse
global shell shows W1/W2/W3 participation over time
channel ratios still sum to approximately 1.0

next_patch_after_success.name: axis_projection_8way_v1
next_patch_after_success.purpose: Add diagonal direction measurement after global shell is stable.
